name: Cash Deposit to Suspend Underpayment Interest

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers who anticipate a tax deficiency and want to mitigate interest exposure during an audit or dispute.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can make a cash deposit to stop the running of underpayment interest on potential tax liabilities not yet assessed, while potentially earning interest on the deposit if returned.
